page_title: Evangelion New Theatrical Edition: EVANGELION ASSAULT ACTION
text:
is a line of candy toys produced by Shokugan that was released in late December 2012. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2012/768513.html The line was based on the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. There are 5 figures in the line.

Toys

{| class="wikitable"

! Series

! Notes

|Evangelion Test Type-01
|Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance
|¥400 (Tax Excluded)
|Late December 2012
|Includes a progressive knife, a pallet rifle, an attachment part for Unit-02 and two alternate hands.
|-

|Evangelion Proto Type-00'
|Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance
|¥400 (Tax Excluded)

|Includes a plastic base and two alternate hands 
|-

|Evangelion Production Model-02'β
|Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo
|¥400 (Tax Excluded)
|Late December 2012
||Includes a long sniper rifle, a progressive knife, a part of the pod and two alternate hands.
|-

|Evangelion Production Model-03
|Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance

||Includes a plastic base and two alternate hands.
|-

Gallery

 
File:EVANGELION ASSAULT ACTION Toy 2.jpg

 

Trivia

The tallest figure is Evangelion Mark.06.
The design of Evangelion Production Model-02'β is different, stil possessing a metalic left arm instead of the prosthetic arm with grappling hooks. Being able to hold the rifle.
